presets.name: Block XML-RPC
presets.description: Blocks all requests to xmlrpc.php — common brute-force and DDoS amplification vector.

presets.name: Block PHP in Uploads
presets.description: Blocks requests to PHP files inside wp-content/uploads — prevents webshell execution.

presets.name: JS Challenge on wp-login.php
presets.description: Serves a JavaScript challenge on the login page to filter bots.

presets.name: Block Known Bad Bots
presets.description: Blocks common scanner and exploit user-agents.
presets.expression: (http.user_agent contains "Nuclei") or (http.user_agent contains "sqlmap") or (http.user_agent contains "Nmap") or (http.user_agent contains "zgrab") or (http.user_agent eq "")

presets.name: Block Common Exploit Paths
presets.description: Blocks requests to sensitive paths that should never be publicly accessible.

presets.name: Cloudflare Managed WAF — WordPress Ruleset
presets.description: Enables Cloudflare's managed WordPress WAF ruleset (requires WAF entitlement).
